volume.description: Root-level volume dataset (represented as attrs in h5_to_dict)

mips.description: MIP projections (coronal, sagittal, axial); N-D for dynamic data

frames.description: Frame timing, gating phase, and trigger data for 4D+ volumes

device_data.description: Embedded device streams (ECG, bellows) following NXlog pattern

provenance.description: Original file provenance, DICOM header, per-slice metadata
